title: Bombay High Court calls for tighter security at Kolhapur district court after attack on lawyer
description: The Kolhapur Bench of the Bombay High Court recently took note of the need for stronger security arrangements at the Kolhapur district court complex following an assault on a woman advocate earlier this month [High Court on its own motion v. Ashwini Patil].A Division Bench of Justices Madhav J Jamdar and Pravin S Patil observed that the the Superintendent of Police has taken various measures to improve the security at the court complex. However, the Court added that there was room for improvemen
